content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt (en-US) explicitly says "public beta" and "We're still testing… expect rough edges", which may trigger review questions about shipping an unfinished build.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects apps whose store copy suggests the build is a beta or trial — that belongs on TestFlight, not the App Store. The en-US release notes describe the release as a "public beta" still under test with "rough edges". Rewrite the release notes to describe finished features (e.g. "New: task sync") and remove beta/test language before submission.
